content: اِلسِتّ دي حَسودَة أوي، حَسَدِت بِنت ي عَلى شَعرَها فَوقَع

transcriptions.arabizi: ilsittadi hasooda 'awy, hasadit bint|i Aala shaAr|aha fa wa'aA

credits: Data from [lisaanmasry](https://eu.lisaanmasry.org/info/en/copyright.html); This material is Copyright © 2007-2020 Mike Green.
relationships: eng:this lady is very envious, she envied my daughter for her hair so it fell out
